title: The Global Economic Recovery Hitting The Speed Bumps
section_path: The Global Economic Recovery Hitting The Speed Bumps
section_path_text: The Global Economic Recovery Hitting The Speed Bumps
summary:
Main
By Ulf Bergman
The global markets have suffered about of severe jitters in recent days, as concerns are developing over the continued strength of the economic recovery in the wake of the pandemic. Much of the negative news flow has originated in China, but the country is by no means the sole source of the growing unease among investors. The exuberance of the first half of the year, when a solid global recovery appeared to be a foregone conclusion, has faded with the resurgence of the pandemic.
